headline: Cadbury Invites Canadians to Make Every Bite Count in New Campaign Supporting Food Banks Canada
summary: Cadbury makes hunger the number to beat with the launch of Make Every Bite Count, a national campaign encouraging Canadians to turn everyday chocolate purchases into meaningful support for those in need. As part of its continued commitment to supporting Canadians in need, Cadbury is contributing a total of $200,000 to Food Banks Canada and select affiliate food banks. Through the campaign, a portion of proceeds from Cadbury product sales between April 6 and May 18 will be donated, up to $100,000
